leadText: Aromatic Mist (Japanese: アロマミスト Aroma Mist) is a non-damaging Fairy-type move introduced in Generation VI. Prior to Generation VII, it was the signature move of Aromatisse.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Aromatic Mist raises the Special Defense stat of a target ally Pokémon by one stage. In a Battle Royal , where there are no allies, it can successfully be used targeting any opposing Pokémon. It will fail if used in a Single Battle or Horde Encounter (even if used by one of the five opposing Pokémon). It will hit the target even if it has used Protect , Detect , or Spiky Shield , but will fail if the target is protected by Crafty Shield or in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move like Fly or Dig . If powered up by a Fairium Z into Z-Aromatic Mist, the user's Special Defense stat is raised by two stages.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user raises the Sp. Def stat of an ally Pokémon by using a mysterious aroma. S V The user boosts the Sp. Def stat of an ally Pokémon by using a mysterious aroma.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD It boosts your teammates' Sp. Def. * It boosts the Sp. Def of your teammates in the same room. The stat returns to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile. *
